xwikidoc.name: Macros
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity filter="none" output="false"}} ## Determine the document that is being annotated. #if ("$!request.reference" != '') #set ($annotationReference = $services.model.resolveDocument($request.reference)) #elseif ("$!request.wiki" != '' && "$!request.space" != '' && "$!request.page" != '') #set ($annotationReference = $services.model.createDocumentReference($request.wiki, $request.space, $request.page)) #elseif ("$!request.sheet" != '') ## When the annotation create / edit / display form is loaded as a sheet for the annotated document. #set ($annotationReference = $doc.documentReference) #end ## ## Not used here but kept for retro-compatibility #set($restURL = "${request.contextPath}/rest") ## Retrieve the annotation class from the configuration #set($config = 'AnnotationCode.AnnotationConfig') #set($annotationClassDocName = $xwiki.getDocument($config).getObject($config).getProperty('annotationClass').value) #set($annotationClass = $xwiki.getDocument("$!{annotationClassDocName}").getxWikiClass()) ## ## ## Do not display these 'internal' properties in the form: #set($hiddenProperties = ['selection', 'selectionLeftContext', 'selectionRightContext', 'originalSelection', 'target', 'date', 'author', 'state', 'replyto', 'highlight'])## TODO: 'color' ## ## #* * Display a box for creating an annotation * * @param $docWiki the wiki of the annotated document * @param $docSpace the space of the annotated document * @param $docPage the page of the annotated document * @param $annData a map containing the mandatory selection-related fields * @deprecated since 7.2M2, use #displayCreateBoxFromReference instead *# #macro(displayCreateBox $docWiki $docSpace $docPage $annData) #displayCreateBoxFromReference($services.model.createDocumentReference($docWiki, $docSpace, $docPage)) #end #* * Display a box for creating an annotation * * @param $docRef the reference of the annotated document * @param $annData a map containing the mandatory selection-related fields *# #macro(displayCreateBoxFromReference $docRef $annData)
#set ($fullRestURL = "${services.rest.url($docRef)}/annotations?media=json")
#foreach($field in $annData.keySet()) #end
#displayAnnotationFromReference($annData, 'create', $docRef)
#end #* * Display a box for editing an annotation * * @param $id the annotation identifier * @param $docWiki the wiki of the annotated document * @param $docSpace the space of the annotated document * @param $docPage the page of the annotated document * @deprecated, starting with 7.2M3, use #displayEditBoxFromReference instead *# #macro(displayEditBox $id $docWiki $docSpace $docPage) #displayEditBoxFromReference($id, $services.model.createDocumentReference($docWiki, $docSpace, $docPage)) #end #* * Display a box for editing an annotation * * @param $id the annotation identifier * @param $docRef the reference of the annotated document *# #macro(displayEditBoxFromReference $id $docRef) #set($ann = $services.annotations.getAnnotation($docRef, $id))
#if($ann) #set($editURL = "${services.rest.url($docRef)}/annotation/${escapetool.url($ann.id)}?method=PUT&media=json")
#displayAnnotationFromReference($ann, 'edit', $docRef)
#else #info($services.localization.render('annotations.action.edit.error.notfound')) #end
#end #* * Display a box containing the annotation * * @param $id the annotation identifier * @param $docWiki the wiki of the annotated document * @param $docSpace the space of the annotated document * @param $docPage the page of the annotated document * @deprecated since 7.2M3, use #displayViewBoxFromReference instead *# #macro(displayViewBox $id $docWiki $docSpace $docPage) #displayViewBoxFromReference($id, $services.model.createDocumentReference($docWiki, $docSpace, $docPage)) #end #* * Display a box containing the annotation * * @param $target the annotated entity identifier * @param $id the annotation identifier * @param $docRef the reference of the annotated document *# #macro(displayViewBoxFromReference $id $docRef) #set($ann = $services.annotations.getAnnotation($docRef, $id))
#if ($ann) #*
$services.localization.render('annotations.action.view.hide.text')
*# ##
#displayAnnotationFromReference($ann $mode $docRef) #else #info($services.localization.render('annotations.action.view.error.notfound')) #end
#end ## ## ## #* * Display form buttons * * @param $mode 'create' or 'edit' *# #macro(displayAnnotationBoxButtons $mode)
#end ## ## #** * Display an annotation * * @param $ann the annotation object * @param $mode view (default), list, create or edit * @param $docWiki the wiki of the annotated document * @param $docSpace the space of the annotated document * @param $docPage the page of the annotated document * @deprecated since 7.2M3, use #displayAnnotationFromReference instead *# #macro(displayAnnotation $ann $mode $docWiki $docSpace $docPage) #displayAnnotationFromReference($ann, $mode, $services.model.createDocumentReference($docWiki, $docSpace, $docPage)) #end #** * Display an annotation * * @param $ann the annotation object * @param $mode view (default), list, create or edit * @param $docRef the reference of the annotated document *# #macro(displayAnnotationFromReference $ann $mode $docRef) #set ($availableModes = ['view', 'list', 'create', 'edit']) #if(!$availableModes.contains("$!{mode}")) #set($mode = 'view') #end
#smallUserAvatar($ann.author)
#displayAnnotationTitle($ann)
#displayAnnotationBody($ann $mode $docRef)
#displayAnnotationToolboxFromReference($ann $mode $docRef)
#if (($mode == 'edit') || ($mode == 'create'))#displayAnnotationBoxButtons($mode)#end
#end ## ## #** * Display the annotation title, containing author and date * * @param $ann the annotation object *# #macro(displayAnnotationTitle $ann) #set ($dateFormat = $xwiki.getXWikiPreference('dateformat', 'dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm')) #set ($authorDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($ann.author)) $escapetool.xml($authorDoc.name) ## Do not indent this, or the comma will be misplaced #if("$!{ann.date}" != '')$xwiki.formatDate($ann.date, $dateFormat)#end #end ## ## #** * Display the annotation toolbox: * - 'verify' button for modified annotations * - 'edit' button for annotation authors and other users with edit rights, unless already editing * - 'delete' button for annotation authors and other users with edit rights * * @param $ann the annotation object * @param $mode view (default), list, create or edit * @param $docWiki the wiki of the annotated document * @param $docSpace the space of the annotated document * @param $docPage the page of the annotated document *# #macro(displayAnnotationToolbox $ann $mode $docWiki $docSpace $docPage) #displayAnnotationToolboxFromReference($ann, $mode, $services.model.createDocumentReference($docWiki, $docSpace, $docPage)) #end #** * Display the annotation toolbox: * - 'verify' button for modified annotations * - 'edit' button for annotation authors and other users with edit rights, unless already editing * - 'delete' button for annotation authors and other users with edit rights * * @param $ann the annotation object * @param $mode view (default), list, create or edit * @param $docRef the reference of the annotated document *# #macro(displayAnnotationToolboxFromReference $ann $mode $docRef) #if ($mode == 'view' && $annotationClassDocName == 'XWiki.XWikiComments') #set($annoDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($docRef)) #set($repliesList = $annoDoc.getObjects('XWiki.XWikiComments', 'replyto', $ann.id)) #set($threadCount = $repliesList.size()) ## Sanitize the xredirect parameter. Fall back to the annotated document view URL when the provided ## redirect is missing or unsafe. #set($replyFallbackURL = "$xwiki.getURL($docRef, 'view', $!{request.queryString})") #getSanitizedURLAttributeValue('a', 'href', "$!request.get('xredirect')", $replyFallbackURL, $xredirect) #if($threadCount > 0) ## #end #if($xwiki.hasAccessLevel('comment')) ## $services.icon.renderHTML('comment') $!escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('core.viewers.comments.reply')) ## #end ## $services.icon.renderHTML('link') $!escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('core.viewers.comments.share')) ## #if($xwiki.hasAccessLevel('comment') && ($hasAdmin || $isUserComment)) ## $services.icon.renderHTML('pencil') $!escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('core.viewers.comments.edit')) ## #end #if ("$!ann.selection" != '' && ($hasAdmin || ($hasEdit && $isUserComment))) ## Converts the annotation into a plain comment by blanking its anchoring fields, the same way Delete uses a ## plain core action (objectremove) rather than the annotation module's own service layer. #set ($commentClassPrefix = "XWiki.XWikiComments_${ann.id}") #set ($solveQueryString = "form_token=${escapetool.url($services.csrf.token)}&xredirect=${escapetool.url($doc.getURL('view'))}&${commentClassPrefix}_target=&${commentClassPrefix}_selection=&${commentClassPrefix}_selectionLeftContext=&${commentClassPrefix}_selectionRightContext=&${commentClassPrefix}_originalSelection=&${commentClassPrefix}_state=") #set ($solveURL = $xwiki.getURL($doc.fullName, 'save', $solveQueryString, "xwikicomment_${ann.id}")) $services.icon.renderHTML('check') $!escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('annotations.action.solve.text')) ## #end #if ($hasAdmin || ($hasEdit && $isUserComment)) #set ($queryString = $escapetool.url({ 'form_token': $services.csrf.token, 'classname': 'XWiki.XWikiComments', 'classid': $ann.id, 'xredirect': $doc.getURL('view')})) #set ($deleteURL = $xwiki.getURL($doc.fullName, 'objectremove', $queryString, "xwikicomment_${ann.id}")) $services.icon.renderHTML('trash') $!escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('core.viewers.comments.delete')) #end #end #end ## ## #** * Display the annotation body, containing all but the hidden fields. * For annotation lists (which are not displayed near the actual annotation text), also display * in a block quote the corresponding annotated extract. * Depending on the mode, display for each field label + input (edit, create) or the field value (view, list). * * @param $ann the annotation object * @param $mode view (default), list, create or edit * @param $annotatedDocumentReference the reference of the annotated document *# #macro(displayAnnotationBody $ann $mode $annotatedDocumentReference) #if ($mode == 'list') #if ($ann.state == 'ALTERED')
$services.localization.render('annotations.altered.text')
#end
$!escapetool.xml($ann.selection)
#end ## in view mode and list mode, also display the original selection of this annotation #if (($mode == 'view' || $mode == 'list') && $ann.state == 'UPDATED')
$services.localization.render('annotations.updated.text')
$!escapetool.xml($ann.originalSelection)
#end #set ($annotatedDocument = $xwiki.getDocument($annotatedDocumentReference)) ## Fake object that allows to use the API to generate the display #set($fakeObj = $annotatedDocument.newObject($annotationClassDocName)) #set($properties = $annotationClass.properties) #if ($properties.size() == $hiddenProperties.size() + 1) ## Do not show property labels if there's only one property to display ## get the only property that is to be displayed #set($onlyProperty = '') #foreach($prop in $properties) #if(!$hiddenProperties.contains($prop.name)) #set($onlyProperty = $prop) #break #end #end #set($discard = $fakeObj.set($onlyProperty.name, "$!{ann.get($onlyProperty.name)}"))
#displayAnnotationProperty($annotatedDocument $fakeObj $onlyProperty $mode)
#else
#foreach($prop in $properties) #if (!$hiddenProperties.contains($prop.name)) #set($discard = $fakeObj.set($prop.name, "$!{ann.get($prop.name)}"))
#displayAnnotationProperty($annotatedDocument $fakeObj $prop $mode)
#end #end
#end #end #macro(displayAnnotationProperty $annotatedDocument $annotationObject $annotationProperty $mode) #if ($mode == 'edit' || $mode == 'create') ## This startupFocus parameter is used by the CKEditor WYSIWYG editor. #set ($wysiwygEditorConfig = { 'startupFocus': true }) ## We use displayEdit and not display('edit') because we want the input field name to be just the property name ## (without the "DocumentReference_objectNumber_" prefix). $annotatedDocument.displayEdit($annotationProperty, '', $annotationObject) #else ## We use display('view') and not displayView because we want the property value to be evaluated in the context of ## the annotated document (i.e. isolated), not the current document. #set ($output = $annotatedDocument.display($annotationProperty.name, 'view', $annotationObject)) ## Remove the HTML macro wrapping because the output is later injected in another HTML macro with wiki=false. #unwrapXPropertyDisplay($output) #end #end {{/velocity}}
